plugin.name: gtkdecor
plugin._long: Server-side window decorations with native GTK3 theme integration. Automatically matches your GTK theme, icon theme, and fonts.

option.name: font
option._long: Fallback font if GTK theme font cannot be determined. Normally uses your GTK font automatically.

option.name: font_color
option._long: Fallback font color if GTK theme color cannot be determined. Normally uses your GTK theme color automatically.

option.name: title_height
option._long: Sets the height of the title bars in pixels.

option.name: border_size
option._long: Sets the border size in pixels.

option.name: button_order
option._long: Sets the order of the window buttons (from left to right).

option.name: active_color
option._short: Fallback color when window is active
option._long: Fallback color when window is active. Normally uses your GTK theme color automatically.

option.name: inactive_color
option._short: Fallback color when window is inactive
option._long: Fallback color when window is inactive. Normally uses your GTK theme color automatically.

option.name: ignore_views
option._short: Decoration disabled for specified window types
option._long: Disables window decoration for windows matching the specified criteria.

option.name: forced_views
option._short: Force decorations for specified window types
option._long: Forces window decoration for windows matching the specified criteria, overriding client decoration preference.
